## Bug description

A clear description of what happened.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Launch the game...
2. Do something...
3. See the error

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Screenshots / videos

If possible, add them.

## Mod version

Example: 0.5.23

## Minecraft and loader version

Example: 26.1.2, Fabric 0.16.9

## Crash report

If there was a crash, paste the content or attach the file.

## Additional context

Any other details.
